zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona於1080年11月11日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿時，他的父親Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona26歲，母親Matilda of Apulia22歲。他於大約1103年與de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1131年7月19日在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利波爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona于1080年11月11日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿时，他的父亲Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona26岁，母亲Matilda of Apulia22岁。他于大约1103年与de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1131年7月19日在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利波爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barcelona
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Amelita, Elvira, Jaime, Luis, Manuel, Mariano, Orlando, Ramon, Romelia.

Catalan and Spanish: habitational name from Barcelona, the principal city of Catalonia. The placename is of uncertain, certainly pre-Roman, origin. The settlement was established by the Carthaginians, and according to tradition it was named for the Carthaginian ruling house of Barca; the Latin form was Barcino or Barcilo.

variants.name: Barcelo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Carlos, Mario, Francisco, Juan, Ruben, Arturo, Eduardo, Humberto, Ignacio, Jaime.
Catalan (Barceló): apparently from the Latin personal name Barcelonus, a male equivalent of Barcelona, originally denoting someone from the city of Barcelona (see Barcelona ).

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

nameMeanings.name: Bérenger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beringer
meanings: German; French (Béringer): from the ancient Germanic personal name Beringari, Beringer, composed of the elements bern ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’. Compare French Belanger and Berenger .
German: habitational name for someone from any of several paces called Behringen or Böhringen in Baden-Württemberg and Bayern. Compare   Baringer  ,   Behringer  ,   Berringer  , and   Boehringer  .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  .

variants.name: Berenguer
meanings: Spanish and French (southern; Bérenguer): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements ber ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’, a cognate of French Bérenger (see Berenger ) and Béringer (see Beringer ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona was born on 11 November 1080, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona, was 26 and his mother, Matilda of Apulia, was 22. He married de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR about 1103. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 19 July 1131, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Ripoll, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona est né le 11 novembre 1080, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Apulia, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR environ 1103. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1131, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.Sant Feliu de Buixalleu,17451,Gérone,Cat: Sant Feliu de Buixalleu, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona am 11. November 1080 in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona 26 und seine Mutter Matilda of Apulia 22. Er hat um 1103 de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1131 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona è nato il il 11 novembre 1080 nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Matilda of Apulia, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR circa 1103. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1131, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelonaが1080年11月11日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナで生まれた時，父Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelonaは26歳，母Matilda of Apuliaは22歳であった。約1103年にde MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVARと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1131年7月19日に故郷で50歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアギロナリポルにて埋葬された。

ko.Sant Feliu de Buixalleu,17451,Gérone,Cat: 스페인 카털니아 지로나 산트 펠리우 데 버이스알레우
ko.lifeSummary: Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona(이)가 1080년 11월 11일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda of Apulia(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1103년 de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 7월 19일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 지로나 리폴에 묻혔다.

pt.Sant Feliu de Buixalleu,17451,Gérone,Cat: Sant Feliu de Buixalleu, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1080, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of Apulia, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR aproximadamente 1103. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1131, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Ripoll, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.Sant Feliu de Buixalleu,17451,Gérone,Cat: сант фелу де буиксаллеу, гирона, каталуня, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona родился 11 ноября 1080 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Apulia, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR около 1103 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июля 1131 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности риполл, гирона, каталуня, Испания.

es.Sant Feliu de Buixalleu,17451,Gérone,Cat: San Felíu de Buxalleu, Gerona, Cataluña, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona nació el 11 de noviembre de 1080, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España, su papá, Ramon Berenguer II de Barcelona, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Matilda of Apulia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con de MARIA RODRIGUEZ Díaz de BIVAR aproximadamente 1103. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 19 de julio de 1131, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Ripoll, Gerona, Cataluña, España.
